description: Protocol registry: every protocol draft published by AGIRight.org, with version history, status, schemas, and live instances. Status values: draft | experimental | proposal | stable | deprecated.

protocols.name: AI Content Rights / AI Content Rules

versions.changes: Initial public draft: default_policy rights vocabulary (read_access, summarization, quotation, rag_use, transformation, training, commercial_use, redistribution), rightRule fields, resource_overrides.

protocols.name: AI Content License / AI Content Licensing Layer

versions.changes: Initial public draft: license catalog (id, rights, price, conditions, requires_contact), payment_endpoints placeholders (quote/pay/verify/revoke), HTTP 402 interoperability.
Initial public draft: eight-level spectrum from No AI Access (L0) to Commercial Redistribution (L7), each level independently licensable and auditable.

Initial public draft: dimension-level learning permissions (access, indexing, inference_input, embedding, training, fine_tuning, distillation, verbatim_memory, attribution, compensation) with allowed | denied | license_required | proportional values.
